title: Ship a game
description: From empty IDE to a playable web build in four steps.

steps.caption: Open a project
steps.narration: Click Open Project in the toolbar to load a folder with juni.toml, or choose Demo Project for a ready-made starter. Your files appear in the Project pane on the left.

steps.caption: Edit the scene
steps.narration: Stay in Edit mode. Use the Hierarchy to select entities and the Inspector to tweak transforms, sprites, and colliders. Changes show in the Scene preview.

steps.caption: Play your game
steps.narration: Switch to Play mode, or press Run, to compile and run. The preview becomes the live game view. Toggle Hot reload if you want saves to recompile while playing.

steps.caption: Export for the web
steps.narration: When you are happy with the game, click Export Web. Juni downloads a self-contained folder you can upload to itch.io, Netlify, or any static host.
